recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm warning will be issued for the Chicago area
recent.evidence: No captured signal reports a severe thunderstorm warning for the Chicago area within the forecast window.

recent.statement: A flash flood will occur in the Rio Grande Gorge near Taos, New Mexico
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a flash flood of this nature would have been recorded if it occurred within the window.

recent.statement: A severe thunderstorm will hit the city of Albuquerque, New Mexico
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe thunderstorm hitting a major city would certainly have been captured, yet none shows it.

recent.statement: A category 2 cyclone will make landfall in Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The only signal shows cyclone ELIDA-26 at Tropical Storm level with zero population affected by Category 1 or higher winds, far short of a Category 2 landfall in Mexico.

recent.statement: A Category 1 tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico
recent.evidence: Signal S1 shows cyclone ELIDA-26 with zero population affected by Category 1 winds and an offshore location, indicating no Category 1 landfall in Mexico occurred within the window.

recent.statement: An earthquake with a magnitude greater than 7.0 will occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: Signal S4's text states that 'an earthquake occurred in Mexico potentially affecting 60 thousand (in MMI>=VII)'. The forecast claimed an earthquake with a magnitude greater than 7.0 would occur in Mexico within the next 24 hours, which matches Signal S4's details.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike Mexico within the next fortnight
recent.evidence: On 7/17/2026 2:48:39 PM, an earthquake occurred in Mexico potentially affecting 60 thousand (in MMI>=VII). The earthquake had Magnitude 7.3M, Depth:18.584km

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in the southern United States within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: There is no mention of a Category 2 hurricane making landfall in the Gulf Coast, USA within the next 24 hours.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will target the Microsoft SharePoint platform
recent.evidence: There are no reports of a major cyberattack targeting the Microsoft SharePoint platform within the given window.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in the Philippines within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: There is no mention of a tropical cyclone making landfall in the Philippines within the next 24 hours, despite several news signals mentioning earthquakes and volcanic eruptions in the region.

recent.statement: A category 3 hurricane will make landfall in the southeastern United States within the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: There is no mention of a category 3 hurricane making landfall in the southeastern United States within the next 24 hours after the window closed, and no such event appears in the seismic or news signals.

recent.statement: The US Federal Reserve will raise interest rates by 50 basis points
recent.evidence: No Federal Reserve rate-decision signal was captured during the window; a 50bp hike would dominate every feed.
